defaults.shareGateBody: When you’re ready, start the puzzle with the photo and messages prepared for you.

setup.previewGamePlaceholder: Add an image on the right to see the crop area and grid.
setup.dropZoneHint: Drop an image here or click to browse (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF — max 8 MB).
setup.step3LabelToolTitle: Shown above the play area during the game (optional)
setup.step3PlaceholderToolTitle: e.g. Happy birthday — leave empty for “Puzzle”
setup.step5Hint: You’ve walked through the same flow as your guest: welcome → play → win. Here you can play locally or generate the link.

uxWalk.chromeBandHtml: This frame = guest view · editing is in the separate panel on the right.
uxWalk.footDefault: The frame shows the window of the person opening your link.
uxWalk.footDesktop: Desktop screen simulation: the guest sees a wider area (desktop proportions).
uxWalk.footPhone: Phone screen simulation: the guest sees a compact vertical frame.
uxWalk.outsideHint0: What the guest sees before tapping “Start”.

a11y.dropZone: Choose an image: drag and drop or click

gridHelpHtml: e.g. 4×3 = 12 pieces. Maximum 64 pieces (columns × rows). The photo uses cover mode: it fills the grid and overflow is cropped from the center (left/right if the photo is too wide, top/bottom if too tall).

hints: Like your guest: they see this card first, then tap “Start”.
Pick the image and grid: that’s what gets sliced during play.
This text appears above the puzzle area during the game (optional).
Message, effect, font, and colors after winning.
This last step isn’t shown to the guest — it’s for you as the creator.

previewCrop.noImage: Add an image: we’ll show which edges will be cropped.
previewCrop.ratioMatch: Your photo almost matches the grid ratio: barely any crop.
previewCrop.cropSides: Your photo is wider than the grid: left and right are cropped (center kept).
previewCrop.cropTopBottom: Your photo is taller than the grid: top and bottom are cropped (center kept).

errors.imageType: Choose an image file (JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF).
errors.needImage: Add an image first (drag-and-drop or Browse).
errors.needLocalImage: To create a link, choose an image from your device (local file).
errors.network: Network or server unavailable. For local dev run Vercel dev or deploy to Vercel.
errors.scenarioGone: This puzzle doesn’t exist or was removed.

apiErrors.MISSING_BLOB_TOKEN: BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN is missing or empty on this deployment. Check the exact name in Vercel (all caps) and redeploy.
apiErrors.BLOB_STORE_PRIVATE: The Blob store is private: this project needs public access for shared images. Make the store public on Vercel or update the token.
apiErrors.RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many puzzle creations. Try again later.
apiErrors.STORAGE_NOT_CONFIGURED: Storage not configured on the server.
apiErrors.SCENARIO_FETCH_FAILED: Couldn’t load the puzzle from storage.

consent.bodyHtml: This site may show ads through Google and use cookies for measurement and personalization. See our privacy policy. You can accept personalization or decline it (less targeted ads).

anniversaire.step1Body: A surprise puzzle awaits for a birthday. Tap “Start” to discover it.
anniversaire.step4Win:
Happy birthday!
Enjoy this special day.

naissance.step1Body: We have a surprise to share in this puzzle. Tap “Start”.
naissance.step4Win:
Surprise: a baby is on the way!
Thanks for sharing our joy.

mariage.step1Body: We have big news to share in this puzzle. Tap “Start”.
mariage.step4Win:
Surprise: we’re getting married!
We’re so happy to tell you.

soiree.step1Body: We’ve planned a surprise evening. Tap “Start” to see the invite.
soiree.step4Win:
Party time!
We can’t wait to celebrate with you.

cadeau.step1Body: A gift is waiting behind this puzzle. Tap “Start”.
cadeau.step4Win:
Surprise unlocked!
Hope you love this gift.

surprise.step1Body: A surprise message hides behind this puzzle. Tap “Start”.

vacances.step1Body: A vacation-themed puzzle is ready. Tap “Start”.
vacances.step4Win:
Happy holidays!
Hope this memory makes you smile.

saint-valentin.step4Win:
Happy Valentine’s Day!
With all my love.
